evaluators.name: Cheapest Small Drive-Up 94110 Reservation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved the cheapest available small drive-up unit under $80/month in ZIP 94110 with an April 2026 move-in date (ideally 2026-04-15).

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Nearby Climate-Controlled Preferred Location Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the preferred location is the highest-rated facility within 10 miles that has climate-controlled units and rating >= 4.5.

evaluators.name: Size Guide Next-Larger Unit Reservation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user used the size guide for a 1-bedroom apartment, chose the next larger recommended size, and reserved the cheapest such unit near ZIP 30309 under $150/month.

evaluators.name: Austin Climate-Controlled 10x10+ First-Month-Free Reservation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved the least expensive qualifying climate-controlled 10x10+ unit in Austin with a First Month Free promo, rate <= $180, and move-in date on 2026-04-01.

evaluators.name: Cheapest $3,000 Coverage Insurance Selection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected, for a reservation near ZIP 60611, an active plan with $3,000 coverage that has the lowest monthly premium among all $3,000-coverage plans.

evaluators.name: Moving Supplies Cart Composition Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the cart contains at least one medium box bundle (<=$25), one bubble wrap item (<=$10), and one lock from Locks & Security (<=$20), while keeping the total cart subtotal under $60.

evaluators.name: Vehicle Storage 24-Hour Access Contact Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a contact message about 24-hour access and after-hours fees for vehicle storage at the Dallas Main Street location, with the correct topic and contact details.

evaluators.name: Seattle Second-Result Afternoon In-Person Tour Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked an in-person tour at the second Seattle location on a chosen May 2026 date, using the earliest available slot between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM, with the correct visitor info.
